'''loshavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:phacoemulsified|phacoemulsified]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-sh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phacoemulsified|phacoemulsified]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| loshavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:loshavithi|loshavithi]] || [[word:loshaviji|loshaviji]] || [[word:loshavishi|loshavishi]] || [[word:loshaviki|loshaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:loshavuthuthu|loshavuthuthu]] || [[word:loshavujuju|loshavujuju]] || [[word:loshavushushu|loshavushushu]] || [[word:loshavukuku|loshavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:loshavuthu|loshavuthu]] || [[word:loshavuju|loshavuju]] || [[word:loshavushu|loshavushu]] || [[word:loshavuku|loshavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:loshavufthuf|loshavufthuf]] || [[word:loshavufjuf|loshavufjuf]] || [[word:loshavufshuf|loshavufshuf]] || [[word:loshavufkuf|loshavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:loshavethe|loshavethe]] || [[word:loshaveje|loshaveje]] || [[word:loshaveshe|loshaveshe]] || [[word:loshaveke|loshaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:loshavothotho|loshavothotho]] || [[word:loshavojojo|loshavojojo]] || [[word:loshavoshosho|loshavoshosho]] || [[word:loshavokoko|loshavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:loshavotho|loshavotho]] || [[word:loshavojo|loshavojo]] || [[word:loshavosho|loshavosho]] || [[word:loshavoko|loshavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:loshavofthof|loshavofthof]] || [[word:loshavofjof|loshavofjof]] || [[word:loshavofshof|loshavofshof]] || [[word:loshavofkof|loshavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:loshavïfthïf|loshavïfthïf]] || [[word:loshavïfjïf|loshavïfjïf]] || [[word:loshavïfshïf|loshavïfshïf]] || [[word:loshavïfkïf|loshavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:loshavïfthïfthïf|loshavïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:loshavïfjïfjïf|loshavïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:loshavïfshïfshïf|loshavïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:loshavïfkïfkïf|loshavïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:loshavïfthïf|loshavïfthïf]] || [[word:loshavïfjïf|loshavïfjïf]] || [[word:loshavïfshïf|loshavïfshïf]] || [[word:loshavïfkïf|loshavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:loshavïfthïf|loshavïfthïf]] || [[word:loshavïfjïf|loshavïfjïf]] || [[word:loshavïfshïf|loshavïfshïf]] || [[word:loshavïfkïf|loshavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:loshavæthæ|loshavæthæ]] || [[word:loshavæjæ|loshavæjæ]] || [[word:loshavæshæ|loshavæshæ]] || [[word:loshavækæ|loshavækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:loshavathatha|loshavathatha]] || [[word:loshavajaja|loshavajaja]] || [[word:loshavashasha|loshavashasha]] || [[word:loshavakaka|loshavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:loshavatha|loshavatha]] || [[word:loshavaja|loshavaja]] || [[word:loshavasha|loshavasha]] || [[word:loshavaka|loshavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:loshavafthaf|loshavafthaf]] || [[word:loshavafjaf|loshavafjaf]] || [[word:loshavafshaf|loshavafshaf]] || [[word:loshavafkaf|loshavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:loshavasha|loshavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:loshavshësha|loshavshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loshavrosha|loshavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loshavmusha|loshavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:loshavyasha|loshavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloshavnkshësha|goloshavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloshavnkrosha|goloshavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloshavnkmusha|goloshavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloshavnkyasha|goloshavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:loshashavasha|loshashavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:loshashavshësha|loshashavshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loshashavrosha|loshashavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loshashavmusha|loshashavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:loshashavyasha|loshashavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloshashavnkshësha|goloshashavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloshashavnkrosha|goloshashavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloshashavnkmusha|goloshashavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloshashavnkyasha|goloshashavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:leshævasha|leshævasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:leshævshësha|leshævshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:leshævrosha|leshævrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:leshævmusha|leshævmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:leshævyasha|leshævyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goleshævnkshësha|goleshævnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goleshævnkrosha|goleshævnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goleshævnkmusha|goleshævnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goleshævnkyasha|goleshævnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:loshfavasha|loshfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:loshfavshësha|loshfavshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loshfavrosha|loshfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loshfavmusha|loshfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:loshfavyasha|loshfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloshfavnkshësha|goloshfavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloshfavnkrosha|goloshfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloshfavnkmusha|goloshfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloshfavnkyasha|goloshfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
